items.title: Jamie Dimon Says His 'Anxiety is High' Over What Could Cause the Next Financial Crisis
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon sees "almost the same thing" happening now that occurred in the lead-up to the Great Financial Crisis.

items.title: Wall Street Should Worry More About AI Than Crypto, Says Changpeng Zhao As Anthropic's Latest Announcement Hammers IBM Stock
items.description: Binance (CRYPTO: BNB) co-founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao said that Wall Street should worry more about artificial intelligence than cryptocurrency after shares of International Business Machines Corp (NYSE:IBM) plunged Monday on Anthropic’s claims about its AI advancements. CZ’s Jibe At TradFi CZ wrote in a sarcastic X post,, “Wall Street was worried about crypto… when they should be worried about AI.” The cryptocurrency billionaire poked fun at some traditional finance companies that have long fear

items.title: Jamie Dimon warns of pre-financial crisis parallels, says some people doing ‘dumb things’
items.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon warned that current market conditions mirror 2008 financial crisis buildup, citing high asset prices and risky lending practices.

items.title: Trump Calls Out Pelosi For Stock Trading, Ignores Republicans With Better Returns, Questionable Trades

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Higher Before Nvidia Earnings; Goldman, JPMorgan Lead Bank Rebound (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rises Wednesday ahead of Nvidia earnings. First Solar stock sinks on downbeat revenue guidance.
